overall.description: Cinematic aerial footage from a video game showing a sci-fi settlement built into massive red rock formations on an alien planet. The camera slowly orbits the cliffside village, revealing expansive canyon depths and distant geological formations under partly cloudy skies.

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting the mountain settlement to survey the landscape from aerial perspective

entered.detail: tall mountain formation with distinctive red mineral deposits on upper slopes
cluster of buildings and platforms built into the cliff face under a rock overhang
scattered white clouds against blue sky

segments.scene_description: Opening view of a massive red rock mountain with a settlement built into its cliff face. The camera begins a slow leftward orbit, showing the village tucked under a large overhang with expansive sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep canyon rim with layered rock formations

events.description: camera movement reveals the deep canyon depths below the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: continuing the orbital path around the mountain, revealing the canyon landscape

entered.detail: steep canyon walls dropping into misty depths below the settlement
flat-topped rock formation visible in the far distance across the canyon

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues orbiting left, the deep canyon below comes into view on the left side of the frame. The settlement shifts to the right while the massive rock overhang remains central, revealing the dramatic vertical scale of the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive alien canyon with distant geological formations

events.description: distant temple-like rock spire becomes visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: completing the orbital survey showing the full scope of the canyon and distant mountains

entered.detail: tall pointed rock formation resembling a temple or tower on the distant horizon
additional structures and platforms visible on lower cliff levels

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the vast expanse of the alien landscape, with a distinctive distant spire visible on the horizon. The camera shows lower levels of the settlement and the full depth of the canyon system as the orbit continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward orbit around a massive red rock mountain, transitioning from a close view of a cliffside settlement to a sweeping panorama of a vast alien canyon. It begins focused on the village tucked beneath a large rock overhang, with the expansive sky dominating the upper frame. As the camera continues its orbit, the perspective shifts to reveal the dramatic vertical scale of the landscape, bringing the deep canyon floor into view on the left while the settlement slides toward the right. The scene then expands further to uncover the lower levels of the village and the full depth of the canyon system before finally revealing a distinctive spire on the distant horizon.
